title: Add research contract drift gating (Golden Test 10)
problem: ticket-012 ranks candidate sources but no module enforces research contract scope. Golden Test 10 requires that out-of-scope follow-up questions are rejected or parked with out_of_scope_topic_drift while on-scope follow-ups are accepted.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 10: research contract prevents topic drift.
docs/agents/09_RESEARCH_RUN_CONTRACT.md concept scope and drift rules.
research_contracts table exists in 0001_initial.sql but no drift validator module yet.
acceptance_criteria: research validate-contract or equivalent scoped CLI evaluates follow-up questions against an active contract without Ollama.
Out-of-scope question (e.g. AI consciousness) is rejected or parked with out_of_scope_topic_drift; on-scope divergent prompting question is accepted.
non_goals: Do not implement public export, LangGraph, theory generation, or live search discovery.
Do not implement full research run orchestration.
rollback_plan: Revert branch phase-1/ticket-013-research-contract-drift. Delete contract validation rows from local SQLite test DBs if needed.
